detailedDescription:
8GB of DDR4 memory.
Entry-level capacity for budget builds on modern mainstream platforms.
additionalSpecs:
Capacity: 8GB
Generation: DDR4
Bandwidth: Up to 25.6 GB/s (DDR4-3200)
Voltage: 1.2V (1.35V for XMP/OC)
Slots: 1 x 8GB
XMP / EXPO Support: Yes
Compatible Sockets: LGA1200, LGA1700, AM4
